reviews.review_description: I love the new weapons, the new UI and the shopping district revamp which reminds me a lot about Shibuya; you guys even restored the train map that I played somewhat but still missed. I would suggest making the achievements to get camos back because i want to know how to get these camos, and you should add a train in the Shopping District to go from district to district instead of having the barrier since t believe there is no use. I've been playing this for over a year and the number of players as the months went buy has drastically decreased. I wish more people appreciated this game and played it
This game is so beautiful and chaotic I love it. The only thing stomping me from playing it 24/7 is the fact that this game is dead. We need to revive this game

Why is it that when i shot my brothers it does two damage.And when they shot me it lowkey hurts girl because there guns do 500 billion damage, . Literally like bruh... Its genualny making me not want to live anymore.. Im afraid of what will happen if i don't start winning NOW. please add something where i can win or have admin or mods or something where i can win..

also sub to ducky vr

The game is amazing don’t get me wrong but it can sometimes lack realism. (This is because of how guns auto reload) that would be the only downside to the game the lobbies are not toxic and it’s great for playing with friends and private lobbies, easily a 9.5 out of 10
Its only down sides are no players and is a little bit glitchiy but other wise the best game ever
This game is one of my longtime favorite games, and I genuinely surprised by the overall reviews on this game. If you’re looking at this, just get the game. It’s free, and you won’t regret it man.
Boibobdraws your buns just get better
so I got this game ready to have until i realised i was the only one playing and i just want to know if its just my game or not, but very good weapons and i just wish i could use them.

I GLICHED OUT OF THE MAP IN TUTORIAL AND YOUR SAYING THAT "theres no bug" N-NO AND I CANT PUT THE SWORD OM MY BACK AND YOUR LIKE "ooh we gonna make the best pvp game ever" AND YOU BETTER NOT IGNORE THIS  AND YOUR STILL TELLING US TO JOIN YOU DISCORD YALL NEED TO LISEN, AND FIX THE BUG, AND FIX THE GUN BUG EVERY SENGLE TIME I TRY TO SHOOT A GUN IT DIDNT WORK AND you don't care. Steal a Sigmon is better. AND DEVS STOP SPAMMING

developer_response.body:
we have never claimed that there are no bugs, nor have we claimed that monkey mayhem the best pvp fangame.
furthermore, there isn't even a tutorial in the version you played the game on, nor is it possible to be unable to shoot a gun (unless out of ammo, firerate, etc.)
so please join the discord to tell us exactly what youre having problems with, or reevaluate what you think is wrong, thanks

reviews.review_description: I like the guns

I love this I love flying with a blitz 9mm or a minigun but I wish there were mags and an actual process where you yourself has to do the entire reloading process though like onward or Pavlov or bonelab

Grapple guns were so clutch for professionals who swung around the bridges but ever since they got nerfed, I feel like the sportsmanship has sorta faded away. I think this game in general is a great game because every update it adds new stuff and I love the new perks. This game features accurate recoil and fire rate. The best part about this platform is how you can fly with most guns in this game which makes travel a lot more fun.

I keep on trying to put my guns in the front pocket and the back but nothing will work how do I get out of the tutorial please help devs I have tried to uninstall the game and install it but it won't work nothing will work help me I put it where the blue boxes is and nothing is working but if I wasn't stuck in the tutorial and it looks like a good game so 3⭐

So let me give it to you straight.
#1 good gun mechanics.
￼#2 a lot of guns.
#3 a little hard to use inventory.
It’s such a good indie game. It’s like gorilla tag but with guns. Because there are a lot of bad gorilla tag like games that suck and this is not one of them.

reviews.review_title: I’m stuck on a level in the tutorial

I’VE DONE EXACTLY WHAT YOU WANT ME TO DO “PROPERLY” PUT MY HAND WITH THE WEAPON INSIDE OVER THE CUBE AND I EVEN PUT MY HAND INSIDE THE CUBE AND DOING THAT STILL WON’T WORK AND PLEASE TELL ME WHY I CAN’T REPLY TO THE DEV’S REPLY, I’VE EVEN TRIED PUTTING THE GUN ON TOP OF THE CUBE AND INSIDE THE CUBE AND I NEED YOU TO TELL ME WHY THE GUN WON’T GO INSIDE THE POCKET EVEN IF I PUT THE GUN OVER AND INSIDE THE CUBE, NO MATTER WHAT I DO THE GUN WON’T GO IN MY POCKET IF THERE ARE 8 PEOPLE WHO FOUND THIS “HELPFUL” THEN PLEASE TELL ME IF THIS IS A SELECTIVE BUG WHERE THE GAME LIKES TO PISS YOU OFF AND MAKE IT UNFAIR FOR OTHER PEOPLE TRYING TO GET IT OUT OF THE TUTORIAL, PLEASE TELL ME IF YOU PURPOSELY MADE THIS BUG SELECTIVE FOR SPECIFIC PEOPLE, AND DONT EVEN THINK ABOUT IGNORING THIS

developer_response.body: please contact me in the discord or write a more detailed report, as i dont believe there is enough information to either help you or begin investigating bugs, thank you

reviews.review_description: The gameplay is really good compared to a lot of other PVP gorilla tag styled games. It excels in its gun variety and its unique way of combat. The movement is very unique with its items the Big downside is that it's really laggy in a lot of the pvp maps
Needs more maps but fun to play with friends
(This comment is helpful)
I can't get the gun in my pocket. I think they are the transparent boxes on the vest but I can't get it in.

developer_response.body: they are the transparent boxes, but the ones on your vest are for projectiles (later in the tutorial). there are boxes on your back (over your shoulder) and sides (positioned like pockets) which are for primary and secondary weapons. the pockets are the one you want for guns like the df9. make sure your hand is properly going over the box and to not be moving or standing on your other hand when putting it in for the most consistency. youll know it works when your controller vibrates and a sound effect plays
